text: A sense of curiosity draws me in as I step toward this glowing, futuristic space. The play of reflection and neon is disorienting and intriguing. Passing through glass doors, I find myself surrounded by artifacts of research and development—human ingenuity on display. There is a quiet exhilaration in witnessing how ideas turn material, how environments are shaped for discovery. The words and exhibits stir philosophical questions about progress and the meaning of innovation. I feel contemplative, both small and expansive, part of an unfolding story of creation.
